summary: Comprehensive regression testing of Zitex Website Module completed. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified Platform Owner login, Admin Dashboard, Client Dashboard (all tabs), Driver Dashboard, Public Site rendering, and Website Studio. All 4 auth token types (Bearer JWT, ClientToken, SiteToken, DriverToken) are properly isolated.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with owner@zitex.com/owner123 returns JWT (Test 1)
Backend: GET /api/websites/projects with JWT lists projects (Test 2)
Backend: GET /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo returns HTML with RTL, PWA manifest link (Test 3)
Backend: GET /api/websites/share/{token} returns HTML (Test 4)
Backend: POST /api/websites/client/login with slug+password returns ClientToken (Test 5)
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/orders with ClientToken returns orders (Test 6)
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/customers with ClientToken returns customers (Test 6)
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/drivers with ClientToken returns drivers (Test 6)
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/support-tickets with ClientToken returns tickets (Test 6)
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/analytics with ClientToken returns analytics (Test 6)
Backend: POST /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/auth/login with existing customer returns SiteToken (Test 7)
Backend: POST /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/auth/register creates new customer with SiteToken (Test 7)
Backend: POST /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/orders creates order with Haversine delivery fee (Test 8)
Backend: GET /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/orders/my returns customer orders (Test 8)
Backend: POST /api/websites/driver/login with slug+phone+password returns DriverToken (Test 9)
Backend: GET /api/websites/driver/cozy-cafe-demo/orders returns assigned orders (Test 10)
Backend: PATCH /api/websites/client/orders/{id} updates status and assigns driver (Test 11)
Backend: GET /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/my-points returns loyalty points (Test 12)
Backend: POST /api/websites/client/coupons creates coupon (Test 13)
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/coupons lists coupons (Test 13)
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/generate-logo-variants endpoint exists (Test 14)
Backend: GET /api/websites/public/cozy-cafe-demo/manifest.json returns valid PWA manifest (Test 15)
Backend: Auth token isolation - ClientToken rejected on driver endpoints
Backend: Auth token isolation - DriverToken rejected on client endpoints
Frontend: Platform Owner login redirects to /admin dashboard (Test 16)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows stats (videos, images, payments, requests, users, activities)
Frontend: Website Studio shows category picker with 12 categories (Test 16)
Frontend: Client Dashboard login with slug+password works (Test 17)
Frontend: Client Dashboard shows all tabs (Orders, Live Map, Customers, Drivers, Delivery, Coupons, Points, Content, Messages, Support)
Frontend: Client Dashboard Live Map shows OpenStreetMap with driver locations
Frontend: Driver Dashboard login with phone+password works (Test 18)
Frontend: Driver Dashboard shows assigned orders and location sharing toggle
Frontend: Public Site /sites/cozy-cafe-demo renders Arabic RTL with hero, about, menu sections (Test 19)
Frontend: Public Site shows cart FAB, auth FAB, WhatsApp FAB
seed_data_creation: Test orders and coupons created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 auth token types (Bearer JWT, ClientToken, SiteToken, DriverToken) are properly isolated. Haversine delivery fee calculation works. Order status flow: pending -> preparing -> picked_up -> delivering -> delivered. Driver assignment via PATCH /client/orders/{id} with driver_id. WhatsApp notification links generated on status updates. PWA manifest at /public/{slug}/manifest.json. All UI is Arabic RTL.

features_verified.admin_dashboard: Working - shows stats and quick actions

mocked_apis: Payment gateways (Mada/STC Pay/Apple Pay) are UI-only mocks
Stripe subscription gate not implemented - studio is open without payment

auth_token_isolation.client_token: Client dashboard endpoints only - rejected on driver endpoints
auth_token_isolation.driver_token: Driver endpoints only - rejected on client endpoints
